evals.expected_output: Processes all meetings via subagents, updates ledger, MEDDPICC, TECHMAPS, CoM, tech stack, architecture, contacts, Salesforce updates
expectations: Account directory found and all meeting files listed
Subagents launched in parallel for each meeting file
Meeting summaries written to empty ## Summary sections
Attendees array in frontmatter uses [[wiki-link]] format
First-name-only attendees resolved to full names using contacts folder, account frontmatter (se/ae/csm), and other meeting attendees
Known contact names and LD team members passed to subagent prompts for name resolution
meeting_type inferred and set if missing
Ledger updated with entries for each meeting (newest first)
Every ledger entry ends with 'Next call: M/DD {type}' or 'Next call: TBD'
Business context updated with recent news if stale
MEDDPICC section uses single [!summary] callout (not collapsed) with all fields
Command of the Message sections populated from extracted data
TECHMAPS sections populated from extracted data
Tech Stack aggregated by category
Architecture diagram created/updated as ASCII art
Salesforce Updates section formatted with latest entry, MEDDPICC, TECHMAPS, tech stack, deal history
Missing contacts created with correct template
Contacts enriched with role and LinkedIn via subagents
Daily note checkbox marked complete
/sales-git skill invoked to commit and push
No blank line between heading and first bullet
Product names match config
